title: Commission clears Várhelyi of wrongdoing after spying probe
summary_full: The investigation followed October media reports alleging that a former Hungarian diplomat had tried to recruit EU officials to spy for Budapest
summary_public: The investigation followed October media reports alleging that a former Hungarian diplomat had tried to recruit EU officials to spy for Budapest

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: Hungarian diplomat had tried to recruit EU officials to spy for Budapest
